title: diversifier_index TEXT column invariant unenforced
description: accounts.diversifier_index is stored as TEXT (decimal string) to hold u128 values safely — an INTEGER column would silently truncate values >= 2^63. This invariant is documented only in a code comment (lines 256–260 in db.rs). A contributor optimizing storage could change the column to INTEGER in a future migration, silently corrupting all diversifier indices >= i64::MAX. No test exercises u128 values that would fail under INTEGER storage. Fix: add a migration test that writes and reads back a diversifier index >= u64::MAX and asserts round-trip correctness.
close_reason: Schema comment at line 256 already explains the TEXT/INTEGER choice. diversifier_index_roundtrip test already exercises u128::MAX. Added one-line 'DO NOT change to INTEGER' warning to the schema comment pointing to the regression test.
